title: perityle rotundifolia
intro: Perityle rotundifolia, also known as the rounded perityle or rounded four o'clock, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Perityle rotundifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Perityle rotundifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
